title: [Sylinar's Spire, Office]
description: Windowless and ancient, the chamber sits sealed against the outer world, its thick stone walls muffling exterior noises.  Alcoves set into the stone cradle glowing orbs and glass-shielded lanterns, filling the room with pale light.  A heavy carpet cushions the floor, and an enormous cobblestone fireplace holds the damp and cold at bay.  Small workspaces are scattered without order throughout, as if the chamber has long answered to many.  Rough-hewn stone frames an open stone-ringed archway leading into the tower beyond.
